title: Approved Change — ECR-228: GNC sensor suite upgrade (IMU P-1092→P-1093, GPS P-1097→P-1098)
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-326. Implements ECR-228.
Approved by: Felix Herrera, 2024-12-18.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1092 (IMU ICM-42688-P): Obsoleted.
2. P-1093 (IMU ADIS16505-2 tactical grade): Added to BOM.
3. P-1097 (GPS antenna patch L1/L2): Obsoleted.
4. P-1098 (GPS antenna helical L1/L2/L5 IP68): Added to BOM.
5. SRC-007 (nav_filter.c): EKF IMU driver updated for ADIS SPI. Attitude accuracy improved to 0.3° roll in bench simulation. Committed Q1 2025.
6. SRC-009 (gps_driver.c): Updated for L5 band support. Committed Q1 2025.
7. DOC-455 (GNC ICD): Updated to Rev B. Attitude accuracy requirement re-confirmed achievable at 0.5° with P-1093.
8. DOC-456 (GPS Performance Specification): Updated to Rev B.
9. DOC-467 (Flight Test Report): Re-issued after re-qualification flight tests (Aisha Mbeki, Q2 2025).
10. DRW-534 (GPS v2 Antenna Installation): Updated for P-1098 helical form factor.
